latin: Goku manus suas coniunxit et omnem vim in unum ictum collegit. 'Kamehameha!' clamavit, et lux immensa ex manibus eius erupit.

questions.prompt: What did Goku do with his hands?

translation: Goku joined his hands together and gathered all his power into a single strike. 'Kamehameha!' he shouted, and an immense light burst forth from his hands.
